highestPriorityGap: Cloud Execution Path — No validated cloud execution or production deployment path.

priorities.rationale: No validated cloud runtime or production deployment. Defer until production readiness gate is proven locally. Current gap: No validated cloud execution or production deployment path.

Real Build Execution and UVL verification prove 15 CRUD-adjacent categories at 100%; Code Generation Engine still limited to 5 profiles. Current gap: Code Generation Engine V1 limited to 5 web CRUD profiles; blocks 58-category diversity.

Large-scale validation harness shows 0% buildSuccessRate despite Real Build Execution proving 100%. Wire harness to RBEP proof chain. Current gap: Large-scale validation shows 0% buildSuccessRate in its harness despite Real Build Execution V1.1 proving 100% for 15 categories.

World2 modules validate in isolation; dry-run bridge does not activate real execution. Connect to Real Build Execution after verification and ownership registration. Current gap: Dry-run composer bridge sets realExecutionPerformed=false; execution proven outside World2 boundary.
Mobile preview modes exist; large-scale mobile runtime validation harness needed for cross-platform vision. Current gap: Mobile preview modes exist; no large-scale mobile runtime validation harness.

Self-evolution is advisory only. Wire gap detection → capability research → build → verify loop with human approval gate. Current gap: Self-evolution and gap detection are advisory; no automated capability modification.

Real Build Execution V1/V1.1, CQI Maturity V1, UVL Verification Execution V1, Capability Audit V2/V3, and Production Readiness Gate need constitutional registration. Current gap: Real Build Execution Pipeline V1/V1.1, UVL Verification Execution V1, CQI Maturity V1, Capability Audit V2 not in ownership registry.

Multi-project foundation and tabs are mature; parallel build orchestration must move from planning to execution. Current gap: Parallel Build Orchestration is planning-only; no concurrent build execution.
V1 and V1.1 PASS: 15/15 proof coverage, execution generalization 96/100. Closed largest V2 operational gap.
